name: Strategic Resources Inc.
description: Strategic Resources Inc. is a Canadian-based exploration and development company focused on the critical minerals sector, specifically targeting vanadium and iron projects. The company aims to become a key supply chain link in the green steel industry by developing direct reduction grade iron pelletizer projects and high-purity pig iron assets. By leveraging its strategic projects in Canada and Finland, Strategic Resources is positioned to support the global transition toward a decarbonized economy, providing essential materials for heavy-duty electrification and sustainable industrial manufacturing processes.
